user.title: FuelWatch Setup - Step 1
user.description: Choose the location name, fuel type, search radius, and location source.

zone.title: FuelWatch Setup - Step 2
zone.description: Enter the Home Assistant zone name or full zone entity ID.

coordinates.title: FuelWatch Setup - Step 2
coordinates.description: Enter the coordinates to use for this location.

error.zone_required: Enter a zone name or full zone entity ID.
error.latitude_invalid: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
error.longitude_invalid: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
